dependencies: Nuclear fuel supply from third parties
Limited suppliers for certain aspects of nuclear fuel supply chain
Single fuel fabrication services provider for nuclear units
risks: Disruptions or cost increases in supply chain including labor shortages
Changes in prices and demand for nuclear fuel
Limited suppliers for uranium conversion, enrichment and fabrication
Transitioning to alternative fuel fabrication provider could take extended period

regulatory_risks: Comprehensive regulation by New Jersey Board of Public Utilities (BPU)
Transportation Security Administration security directives for natural gas pipelines
New York SHIELD Act data security requirements
Potential elimination of 50 basis point ROE adder for RTO membership
Changes to transmission planning and cost allocation rules
Capacity market rule changes and auction delays
New Jersey Dirty Dirt legislation for soil disposal
New Jersey Industrial Site Recovery Act (ISRA)
Potential changes to federal and state tax laws
New Jersey Energy Master Plan implementation
Grid modernization and interconnection rule changes
Potential restrictions on natural gas use in buildings
Climate change-related legislative and regulatory burdens
